title: gChat
description: gChat - This is not just a chat plugin, it is a full-fledged communication system that will turn ordinary Minecraft chat into a powerful tool for your community!
body:
# 💬 gChat — The Ultimate Chat Management Solution

**gChat** is a modern, highly optimized, and feature-packed chat management plugin for Spigot/Paper servers. Whether you need simple local/global chat separation, stunning HEX gradients, interactive messages, or advanced regex moderation, gChat provides an all-in-one solution to make your server's communication beautiful and safe.

---

### Addons:

[gChatGUI](https://modrinth.com/plugin/gchatgui) 

---

### ✨ Core Features

* 🌍 **Local & Global Chat:** Easily separate conversations with configurable chat radius. Players can switch modes using `/l` and `/g`.
* 🎨 **RGB, HEX & Gradients:** Full support for modern Minecraft colors. Create stunning gradients using `{#start_hex>}text{#end_hex<}` or standard `&#hex` codes!
* 🖱️ **Interactive Chat (JSON):** Hover over player names to see their ranks or stats (PlaceholderAPI support), and click to quickly send a private message.
* 🗡️ **Item Showcase (`[item]`):** Allow players to show off their gear! Typing `[item]` in chat displays the item in their main hand with a beautiful hoverable tooltip showing enchantments, lore, and amount.
* 💭 **Chat Bubbles:** Bring your server to life! When players speak, holographic chat bubbles appear above their heads for a few seconds.

### 🛡️ Smart Moderation & Protection

* 🧠 **Advanced Regex Filter:** Block swears, insults, and advertisements. The smart regex engine catches bypass attempts (like `s.w.e.a.r` or `w.o.r.d`).
* 🛑 **Anti-Spam & Anti-Caps:** Prevent players from sending duplicate messages or spamming CAPITAL LETTERS.
* 🔗 **Link & IP Blocker:** Automatically block unauthorized links and server IPs in the chat.
* 🔇 **Mute System Hooks:** Seamlessly integrates with **Essentials** and **AdvancedBan**. If a player is muted there, gChat won't let them speak!
* 🧹 **Chat Control:** Clear the chat (`/clearchat`) or mute the entire global chat globally (`/mutechat`) during emergencies.

### ⚙️ Deep Customization

* 🎭 **Group-Specific Formats:** Create unique chat formats, Join, and Quit messages for different **LuckPerms** ranks.
* 💀 **Detailed Death Messages:** Replaces boring vanilla deaths. Set unique, customizable messages based on the exact cause of death (Fall, Lava, Void, Fire, Drowning, Player Kill, Mob Kill).
* 🏆 **Custom Advancements:** Beautiful, hoverable advancement announcements that natively support both Vanilla and Datapack/Modded advancements!
* 📺 **Custom Channels:** Create specific channels (e.g., Staff Chat, Trade Chat) with their own permissions, aliases, and radius. 
* 📢 **Auto-Broadcaster:** Scheduled server announcements with multi-line support, headers, footers, and clickable URL links.

### 🧑‍🤝‍🧑 Player Experience

* 🔔 **Mentions & Pings:** Type `@Player` to notify them with a sound and Action Bar message. Admins can use `@everyone`.
* ✉️ **Private Messages & Spy:** Built-in `/msg` and `/reply` system. Admins can silently monitor conversations using Social Spy.
* 🛠️ **Personal Settings Menu (`/settings`):** Players can customize their chat experience! They can toggle global chat, disable death/join messages, change their mention sound, or even set a **personal chat color theme**.

---

### 🔌 Supported Integrations

gChat plays nicely with your favorite plugins to expand its functionality:
* **LuckPerms:** Prefix, Suffix, and group-based formatting.
* **PlaceholderAPI:** Use any placeholder in chat formats, hover texts, and join/quit messages.
* **DiscordSRV:** Two-way chat synchronization between your Minecraft server and Discord server.
* **Towny:** Add Town and Nation tags directly into the chat format.
* **EssentialsX & AdvancedBan:** Native mute checking.

---

### 📂 Installation & Setup
1. Drop the `gChat.jar` into your `plugins` folder.
2. Ensure you have **LuckPerms** and **PlaceholderAPI** installed (Optional, but highly recommended).
3. Restart the server. 
4. Configure your formats, filters, and settings in the deeply commented `config.yml`.
5. Run `/gchat reload` to apply changes instantly!

---
